chapter_title.en: Chapter on Performing the Tawaf of Hajj and the Tawaf of Women Before sa’y and Before Departing to Mina

text: 2778 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَفْصِ بْنِ اَلْبَخْتَرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي تَعْجِيلِ اَلطَّوَافِ قَبْلَ اَلْخُرُوجِ إِلَى مِنًى فَقَالَ «هُمَا سَوَاءٌ أَخَّرَ ذَلِكَ أَوْ قَدَّمَهُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2778 - Ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Hafs ibn al-Bukhtari, from Abu al-Hasan (as), regarding performing the tawaf early before going to Mina.
Imam (as) said: "It is the same, whether he delays it or performs it earlier."
